title: Maersk to Halt Some Red Sea Shipping in Sign of War’s Disruption to Global Supply Chain
summary_full: Though the conflict is centered on the Persian Gulf, shipping companies fear that the Iran-backed Houthi militia in Yemen could resume attacks on vessels in the Red Sea hundreds of miles to the west.
summary_public: Though the conflict is centered on the Persian Gulf, shipping companies fear that the Iran-backed Houthi militia in Yemen could resume attacks on vessels in the Red Sea hundreds of miles to the west.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran-backed Houthi militia in Yemen could resume attacks on vessels
